title: 食い倒れ！　七福神グルメめぐり

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head to the shopping district to pick up a few
things on my day off. Coincidentally...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: It's time, Spe! Let's stock up on good luck...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: For the Eat-Till-You-Drop Tour, right?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer! Would you like to accompany us?
We're on our way to the Eat-Till-You-Drop Seven
Gods of Fortune Fine Food Tour! ♪

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: With the Seven Gods' blessings, our bellies will be full not just with food, but with good luck too! This event was tailor-made for me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And there's more! I've prepared some special
charms, just for today!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
They're anti-bloat charms! You can have these
two I made as backup!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yippee! Looks like I'll be going for seconds on
luck as well!
choice_data_list: Seconds on the weight gain too...
Seconds on the weight gain too...
Go and eat until you drop!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yippee! Looks like I'll be going for seconds on
luck as well!
choice_data_list: Seconds on the weight gain too...
Seconds on the weight gain too...
Go and eat until you drop!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Say what?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh no! Fukukitaru, do you happen to have any
charms that'll stop us from gaining weight?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
No, sorry... You see, I gave the one I had to
Mc—uh, the daughter of a certain respectable
family the other day...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Nooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After discussing which charms they'll need the
next time around, the pair head home.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All right! First up is Ebisu's Eb-citing Shrimp
Tempura Bowl—ten bowls to be exact!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh! And I'll have the Daikokuten's Dai-licious
Daikon Hot Pot for ten!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That was delicious! Thanks to the power of the
charm, I polished off ten servings lickety-split!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Urk... Yeah, y-you sure did.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'll have the Benzaiten's Un-bean-lievable Red
Bean Soup next! I've got a whole nother stomach
for sweets, so twenty servings should be a piece
of cake! ♪

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The great Shiraoki is waiting for me... Waiting to
ferry me to the other side...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Eat-Till-You-Drop Tour really lives up to its
name... They keep going until they're on the
floor...
